title: WaveDataset - Metadata API
description: Represents the WaveDataset object in the Analytics application. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

application.description: The internal name of the application.

description.description: The dataset description that appears in the user interface.

masterLabel.description: The user interface label name of the dataset.

templateAssetSourceName.description: Links the dataset to the template used to create it. Null for assets not created from a template.

type.description: The type of the dataset. Dataset types include Default, Live, StagedData, and Trended.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="WaveDataset">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="application" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="templateAssetSourceName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="type" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
